title: Anyone know how much this Christmas set usually cost
display_title: Anyone know how much this Christmas set usually cost
wikitext:
[]: Anyone know how much this Christmas set usually cost?             Quote Post by AirXNight » Mon Jul 11, 2011 6:56 am http://cgi.ebay.com/EVANGELION-Christmas-Figure-Comic-Manga-REI-ASUKA-/280666737142?pt=LH_DefaultDomain_0&hash=item41590a89f6 Just wondering how much this item usually goes for. Caught my interest but I couldn't find any information about them and don't know if they are overpriced.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 11, 2011 7:13 am I've seen them for less in the past, but they're limited edition, so their asking price has gone up over the years. $50 is not too outrageous considering their age and availability. Not to mention these look to be in mint condition, and shipping is free, and the item is in the United States. If it were me, I would make the person a best offer to try and shave $10 or so off of the asking price. I wouldn't mind having them for $40.
